title: Data Management
ownershipDesc: You own your data. You can view, export, or delete it at any time.
deleteWarning: Delete is only available for Archived licenses (30+ days overdue). RKSV fiscal records are retained for at least 7 years.
processing: Export is processing. It will be ready within 24 hours.
ready: Export ready. A download link was sent (valid 7 days).
rksvNote: Fiscal RKSV data (payments, receipts, daily closings, audit logs) must be retained for at least 7 years.
rksvFallback: Fiscal receipts and audit logs must be retained for at least {{years}} years.
reasonPlaceholder: Optional reason for the deletion request
deleteConfirmBody: Only for Archived licenses (30+ days). After confirmation a 7-day wait applies. RKSV receipts, payments, fiscal invoices, online orders, and vouchers are kept. Purge is irreversible.
confirmBody: This starts the 7-day wait. After that, auto-purge runs (or Super Admin may execute).
executeBody: Irreversible. Non-fiscal data will be deleted. Restore from backup only.
pendingRequestBody: Status: {{status}}. Confirm in FA to start the 7-day wait.
noTenantContext: No tenant context — select a mandant first.

wizard.title: Data deletion request
wizard.irreversibleBody: After confirmation a 7-day wait applies. Non-fiscal commercial data will then be purged. Restore is only possible from a backup.
wizard.ackRksv: I accept that RKSV data (receipts, payments, fiscal invoices, daily closings, audit logs) will be retained for at least 7 years.
wizard.ackCommercial: I accept that commercial data (products, customers, categories, and similar non-fiscal records) will be deleted.
wizard.reviewPreparing: Your deletion request will be recorded and confirmed.
wizard.reviewWait: Non-fiscal data will be purged after a 7-day waiting period.
wizard.reviewEmail: A confirmation email will be sent to the mandant administrators.
wizard.reviewNote: Fiscal RKSV records are never purged by this flow.
wizard.successBody: Your data deletion was confirmed. Non-fiscal data will be purged after 7 days (or earlier by Super Admin).
wizard.successRksv: RKSV data remains retained for at least 7 years.

admin.rksvNote: Fiscal RKSV data (payments, receipts, daily closings, audit logs) must be retained for at least 7 years. Deletion requests only purge non-fiscal customer/business data.

rights.title: Customer data rights (GDPR)
rights.ownershipBody: You own your data. You can view, export, or request deletion at any time (subject to RKSV retention and license lifecycle rules).
rights.introBody: View is instant and auto-approved. Export is auto-approved and ready within 24 hours. Delete requires manual confirmation and a 7-day wait; only non-RKSV data is purged.
rights.exportProcessing: Export is processing. It will be ready within 24 hours.
rights.exportLinkReady: Export ready. A download link was sent (valid 7 days).
rights.requestFailed: Could not create the data rights request.
rights.deleteNote: Delete is only available for Archived licenses (30+ days overdue). RKSV fiscal records are retained for at least 7 years.
rights.modalInfoBody: Export packages are prepared within 24 hours. Deletion requests require confirmation and a 7-day waiting period.

cardDesc.export: Download your data as a ZIP package
